name: Hit the Fan
author: Poki
description: Hit the Fan is a chaotic action game where your mission is to knock out other fans by flinging—you guessed it—poop! Dive into poop-flinging battles, taking on waves of fans in the ultimate sky showdown. Each wave brings new power-ups to boost your firepower, letting you unleash explosive poop bombs to clear the field. With loads of customization options and hundreds of zany levels, you’ll need sharp aim and quick reflexes to conquer the fan arena. Ready to aim, fling, and dominate? How to play Hit the Fan? Click and hold to aim, release to shoot. Who created Hit the Fan? Hit the Fan is created by Happylander Ltd. Play their other games on Poki: Bowling Champion , Bottle Flip Challenge , Speed Pool King , Ping Pong Go! , and Penalty Rivals ! How can I play Hit the Fan for free? You can play Hit the Fan for free on Poki. Can I play Hit the Fan on mobile devices and desktop? Hit the Fan can be played on your computer and mobile devices like phones and tablets.
